perks.name: Brace for Impact
perks.description: When defending, all units gain +15% cover bonus.

perks.name: Reckless Assault
perks.description: +30% damage dealt, but +20% damage received until next turn.

perks.name: Stalwart
perks.description: If this squad did not move, counterattacks deal 100% damage instead of 50%.

perks.name: Executioner's Instinct
perks.description: +25% crit chance vs squads with any unit below 30% HP.

perks.name: Shieldwall Discipline
perks.description: Per Tank in front row: all squad units take 5% less damage (max 15%).

perks.name: Isolated Predator
perks.description: +25% damage when no friendly squads within 3 tiles.

perks.name: Vigilance
perks.description: Critical hits against this squad become normal hits.

perks.name: Field Medic
perks.description: At round start, lowest-HP unit heals 10% of max HP.

perks.name: Opening Salvo
perks.description: +35% damage on squad's first attack of the combat only.

perks.name: Last Line
perks.description: When last friendly squad alive: +20% hit, dodge, and damage.

perks.name: Cleave
perks.description: Melee attacks also hit one unit in the row behind the target, but all damage reduced by 30%.

perks.name: Riposte
perks.description: Counterattacks have no hit penalty (normally -20).

perks.name: Guardian Protocol
perks.description: When adjacent friendly squad is attacked, one Tank absorbs 25% of damage.

perks.name: Overwatch
perks.description: Skip attack to auto-attack at 75% damage next enemy that moves in range.

perks.name: Adaptive Armor
perks.description: -10% damage from same attacker per hit (stacks to 30%, resets per round).

perks.name: Bloodlust
perks.description: Each unit kill this round: +15% damage on next attack (stacks, resets per round).

perks.name: Fortify
perks.description: +5% cover per consecutive turn not moving (max +15% after 3 turns, moving resets).

perks.name: Precision Strike
perks.description: Highest-dex DPS unit targets the lowest-HP enemy instead of normal targeting.

perks.name: Resolute
perks.description: A unit that would die survives at 1 HP if it had >50% HP at round start (once per unit per battle).

perks.name: Grudge Bearer
perks.description: +20% damage vs enemy squads that have damaged this squad (stacks to +40%).

perks.name: Counterpunch
perks.description: If attacked last turn AND did not attack last turn, next attack deals +40% damage.

perks.name: Deadshot's Patience
perks.description: If completely idle last turn (no move, no attack), next ranged attack gains +50% damage and +20 accuracy.
